---
title: "![AAU logo](images/AAU_GREEN_DARKTONE.png){width=5%} Earth Day 2026"
subtitle: "Communicating Climate Change Research"
image: /images/earth_day_cc.png
---


# Photo Gallery


::: {layout="[[1,1], [1,1]]"}

!["Uneven buffering of U.S. maize yields against extreme heat" by [*Marina Friedrich*](https://sites.google.com/view/mfriedrich)](/images/ed26/MF_26.jpg)

!["Learning from Earth’s climate history" by [*Kathrine By Larsen*](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kathrine-by-larsen/)](/images/ed26/KL_26.jpg)

!["Do Renewable Energy Subsidies Work?," by [*Linde Kattenberg*](https://www.ventosa-santaularia.com/)](/images/ed26/PD_26.jpg)

!["Spurious Relationships in Climate Data" by [*Daniel Ventosa-Santaulària*](https://sites.google.com/site/erichillebrand/)](/images/ed26/DVS_26.jpg)


:::
